prompt: A realistic black and white street fashion snapshot, 2:3 vertical. A fashionable young adult woman stands inside or by the window of a small urban bakery. Framed from mid-thigh to slightly above the head. The subject occupies the right two-thirds of the frame, with a bakery display case filling the left third to create a layered environmental portrait. Close-up, natural eye-level perspective, body slightly tilted left, parallel to the glass counter. Subject: Long straight black hair parted in the center, naturally falling over shoulders to below the chest. Smooth but not over-styled, with a few loose strands around the cheeks. Round dark sunglasses with thin metal frames—subtle reflections of the bakery interior and window light in the lenses. Looking slightly down at a smartphone in her hands. A calm, focused, and slightly satisfied expression—relaxed lips with a subtle hint of a smile. Clothing: An oversized light-colored button-down shirt in soft cotton or linen—pointed collar, visible chest pocket, slightly wrinkled fabric, sleeves casually rolled below the elbows. Loose natural drape with realistic folds at the shoulders, elbows, waist, and where tucked in. Dark high-waisted jeans or trousers with a dark leather belt and a simple rectangular metal buckle. An elegant vintage analog watch with a thin metal chain strap on the left wrist. All accessories are minimalist. Smartphone: Held horizontally and slightly upward with both hands at waist height, as if typing or reading. Accurate hands: realistic finger spacing, natural joints, short nails, no anatomical distortion. Display Case: A large glass pastry case extending diagonally from the bottom-left foreground toward the top-left background. Rows of donuts, pastries, bagels, and glazed baked goods on metal trays. Closest pastries are identifiable but slightly soft-focused—reflective icing, uneven handmade surfaces, powdered sugar dusting, and occasional paper liners. Reflections, smudges, faint streaks, and layered interior shapes on the glass. Background: Dense layered city streets behind the woman and through the reflective glass—blurred pedestrians, storefronts, signage, lights, and architectural forms. All background figures are anonymous and heavily bokeh-ed. Bright circular bokeh highlights and diffused reflections in the top-left and top-center background. Vibrant metropolitan feel; no identifiable brand names or locations. Composition: Classic documentary style—the woman stands out clearly against the busy, blurred background. The display case serves as a strong diagonal leading line from the bottom left toward her hands and face. Head located in the upper right quadrant; the smartphone as a secondary focal point near the bottom center. Slightly asymmetrical, natural snapshot framing, non-perfect pose. Black and White Tones: Rich, wide grayscale range—deep blacks in the hair, sunglasses, trousers, and shadows; luminous light grays in the shirt and skin highlights; layered mid-grays in the glass, pastries, and urban reflections. Strong controlled contrast, detailed shadow information, soft highlight transitions, and slight coarse-grained analog film texture. Lighting: Diffused daylight through the storefront window—soft front-left lighting on the forehead, cheekbones, bridge of the nose, lips, shirt collar, hands, and watch. Deeper shadows on the hair and the right side of the body. No harsh flash or glamour lighting. Window and glass reflections overlap parts of the subject without obscuring the face. Camera: Classic 35mm B&W film feel, approximately 50mm full-frame, medium-wide aperture, shallow to medium depth of field. Face/sunglasses/hands/shirt/phone are sharp; foreground pastries and distant streets gradually blur. Fine silver grain texture, slight halation around bright bokeh, subtle vignetting, authentic glass reflections, and gentle edge softening. Atmosphere: Intimate urban solitude in a crowded city, stylish but effortless, quiet focus, nostalgic documentary authenticity, and sophisticated street photography. Negative: No color, no text, no readable signs, no watermarks, no logos, no extra sharp-focused people, no studio background, no exaggerated smiles, no heavy makeup, no plastic skin, no distorted glasses, no deformed hands, no extra fingers, no repeated pastries, no excessive blurring of the subject, no artificial HDR effect.

promptZh: 一张写实的黑白街头时尚快照，比例 2:3 竖构图。一位 时尚的年轻女性 站在 小型城市面包店 内或橱窗旁。取景范围从大腿中部到头部上方。主体占据画面右侧三分之二，左侧三分之一为面包展示柜，营造出层次丰富的环境肖像感。特写镜头，自然的平视视角，身体略微向左倾斜，与玻璃柜台平行。主体：黑色长直发中分，自然垂落在胸前。发质柔顺但不刻意造型，脸颊周围有几缕碎发。佩戴圆形深色细金属框太阳镜——镜片上隐约映出面包店内部和窗外的光线。目光微微下垂，注视着手中的智能手机。表情平静、专注且略带满足——双唇放松，带着一丝淡淡的微笑。服装：一件 浅色廓形衬衫，材质为柔软的棉麻面料——尖领设计，可见胸袋，面料有轻微褶皱，袖子随意卷至肘部下方。自然垂坠，在肩部、肘部、腰部及束腰处有写实的褶皱。深色高腰牛仔裤或长裤，搭配深色皮带和简约的矩形金属扣。左手腕佩戴一款优雅的复古模拟手表，配有细金属链表带。所有配饰均走极简风格。智能手机：双手横向持握于腰部高度，略微向上，仿佛正在打字或阅读。精准的手部细节：写实的手指间距、自然的关节、短指甲，无解剖结构畸变。展示柜：一个大型玻璃糕点柜，从左下角前景向左上角背景斜向延伸。金属托盘上摆放着成排的甜甜圈、糕点、贝果和糖霜烘焙食品。近处的糕点清晰可见但略带柔焦——反光的糖霜、不规则的手工表面、撒上的糖粉以及偶尔出现的纸托。玻璃上有反光、指纹、淡淡的条纹以及重叠的内部形状。背景：女性身后及反光玻璃外是密集的城市街道——模糊的行人、店面、招牌、灯光和建筑轮廓。所有背景人物均为匿名且经过重度虚化处理。左上角和左中背景有明亮的圆形光斑和漫反射光。充满活力的都市氛围；无任何可辨认的品牌名称或地点。构图：经典的纪录片风格——女性在繁忙、模糊的背景中清晰突出。展示柜作为一条强有力的对角线引导线，从左下角延伸至她的手部和面部。头部位于右上象限；智能手机作为次要焦点位于底部中心。略显不对称，自然的快照构图，非刻意的姿态。黑白影调：丰富且宽广的灰度范围——头发、太阳镜、长裤和阴影处呈现深黑色；衬衫和皮肤高光处呈现明亮的浅灰色；玻璃、糕点和城市倒影处呈现层次分明的中间调灰色。强力且可控的对比度，细腻的阴影细节，柔和的高光过渡，以及轻微的粗颗粒模拟胶片质感。光线：通过店面橱窗的漫射日光——前额、颧骨、鼻梁、嘴唇、衬衫领口、手部和手表上有柔和的左前方照明。头发和身体右侧有较深的阴影。无强烈的闪光灯或美颜灯光。窗户和玻璃的反射部分重叠在主体上，但不遮挡面部。相机：经典的 35mm 黑白胶片感，约 50mm 全画幅镜头，中等光圈，浅至中等景深。面部、太阳镜、手部、衬衫和手机清晰锐利；前景的糕点和远处的街道逐渐模糊。细腻的银盐颗粒质感，明亮光斑周围有轻微晕影，细微的暗角，真实的玻璃反光，以及柔和的边缘处理。氛围：拥挤城市中的私密都市孤独感，时尚而不费力，安静的专注，怀旧的纪录片真实感，以及精致的街头摄影风格。负面提示：无彩色，无文字，无清晰可辨的招牌，无水印，无 Logo，无额外清晰对焦的人物，无摄影棚背景，无夸张的笑容，无浓妆，无塑料感皮肤，无扭曲的眼镜，无畸形的手部，无多余的手指，无重复的糕点，无对主体过度的模糊，无人工 HDR 效果。
